title: bidens urceolata var. leptolepis
intro: Bidens urceolota var. leptolepis, also known as the variable beggarticks, is a plant species in the daisy family with a variable leaf shape and a medicinal history. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens urceolata var. leptolepis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
